verses.text: Tua lai tungah a min a gelh masa mite a masa pen Hilkiah' tapa, gam ukpa Nehemiah hi a, tua ciangin Zedekiah in zom hi. Tua ciangin
Maaziah, Bigai, leh Shemaiah in gelh uh hi.
Azaniah' tapa Jeshua, Henadad-te beh Binnui, Kadmiel
Hodiah, Bani, leh Beninu ahi uh hi.
Maluk, Harim, leh Baanah-te ahi uh hi
A omlai Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite, kongcingte, lasate, biakinn nasemte, a zite a tapate leh a tanute, thu teltheihna a nei, Pasian' thukham hangin gamdang mite panin a tuam om mi khempeuh in

a sanggam uh ahi amau' makaite pawmin, Pasian' nasem Moses in a piak Pasian' thukham zui-in, eite' Topa ahi Topa' thupiakna khempeuh, ama ngeinate leh ama thukhamte a zuihna ding uh kiciamna a bawl uh hi
Gamdang mite tungah i tanute i kha kei ding a, i tapate' zi dingin zong i la kei ding hi

Hih mite in Sabbath ni-in van ahi a, an ahi zongin hong zuak leh Sabbath ni leh ni siangtho khat peuhpeuh ni-in i lei kei ding hi. Kum sagihna-a an piangte nusia-in tua kumin leiba khempeuh i maisak ding hi

Eite' Pasian' biakinn-ah nasepna ding ahi Ompihna Anlum, a manmanin an tawh biakna, a manmanin meihal biakna, Sabbath ni, Khadet ni, a kiseh pawite, biakna letsongte, leh Israel mite' tangin a kibawlsak ahi kilemna bawlna dingin mawhna hanga biaknate, leh i Pasian' biakinn-ah sep ding a kisam dangte khempeuhah zat dingin kum simin shekel khat seh thumah khat piak ding ka kiciam uh hi

Tua ciangin thukham sunga a kigelh bangin a kiseh hunin a kumkumin Topa eite' Pasian' biakna tau tungah cih dingin beh a banbanin i Pasian' biakinn sungah sing a kitutna dingin siampite, Levi mite, leh ko mi vekpite in sing pua ding sehna ai ka san uh hi
I leitang panin a piang anpalte leh singgah kungte panin a gah masa khempeuh a kumkumin Topa' biakinn-ah puak ding ka kiciam uh hi

Thukham sunga kigelh mah bangin i Pasian' biakinn-ah a om, i Pasian' biakinn sungah na a sem siampite kiangah zong tapa upa pente leh bawngte' tacilte, leh ganhonte' tacilte, leh tuuhonte' tacilte paipih ding

leh annel lom meek masak pen siampite tungah puak ding, leh gahnei sing khempeuh panin a gah masa, sathau leh leenggahzu thakte khempeuh i Pasian' biakinn sung vankoihna-ah puak ding, leh lokhawhna khuaneute khempeuhah sawmah khat a kaikhawmte pen Levi mite ahih manin leitang panin sawmah khat khempeuh Levi mite kiangah puak ding ka kiciam uh hi

Levi mite in sawmah khat a khop uh ciangin Aaron' suan siampite tawh hih khawm ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in i Pasian' biakinn sunga vankoihna a kilawm mun inndeite-ah sawmah khat a ngah uh sung pan sawmah khat puaksawn ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh biakinn umlebeelte a kikoihna inndeite leh na a sem siampite, kongcingte leh lasate a giahna inndeite-ah Israel mite leh Levi mite in a kipia ante, leenggahzu leh sathaute a paipih ding uh ahi hi. Eite' Pasian' biakinn kinloin i om kei ding hi.
